TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Alonzo Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Alonzo Bradley, biru na p'unro. qnxan nya Bradley htagan beh sa misisipico yotica.sraral ga cyux hopa pqwasan biru ptlubuw. 1977-1980 kawas hiya ga maki Amerika NBA Houston Rockets moyay 99 qnahan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: alonzo Œ≤ra*lej s~…ïraral ƒßja î…£a s~…ïis~…ïjuw na nŒ≤a, wal malaxmis~…ïuq qanij la. kawas~…ï taj ****, rjax s~…ïa taj ** nqu taj **, alonzo Œ≤ra*lej, Œ≤iru na p îunro. qnxan nja Œ≤ra*lej ƒßta…£an Œ≤eƒß s~…ïa mis~…ïis~…ïipi ¶~ ®o joti ¶~ ®a.s~…ïraral …£a ¶~ ®jux ƒßopa pqwas~…ïan Œ≤iru ptluŒ≤uw. ****-**** kawas~…ï ƒßija …£a maki amerika nŒ≤a ƒßous~…ïton ro ¶~ ®kets~…ï mojaj ** qnaƒßan. ¶~ ®inkƒßulan s~…ïa knita î s~…ïa Œ≤rŒ≤iru î lis~…ïts~…ï o* national Œ≤as~…ïketŒ≤all as~…ïs~…ïo ¶~ ®iation plajers~…ï
S.FORM: Alonzo Bradley sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1953, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 10, Alonzo Bradley, biru na p'unro. qnxan nya Bradley htagan beh sa misisipico yotica.sraral ga cyux hopa pqwasan biru ptlubuw. 1977-1980 kawas hiya ga maki Amerika NBA Houston Rockets moyay 99 qnahan. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
